notes: Runs great. Load times are very slow though and not sure if it is the same for Windows. No issues experienced other than slow load times.
title: UBOAT

notes: UBOAT has two issues but otherwise runs well.  First, the opening splash screens are completely blacked out, and you can progress through them by pressing any key three times.  Second, the game screen will not restore after being minimized.  To work around this, use winecfg (WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steamapps/compatdata/494840/pfx winecfg) and emulate a virtual desktop in the "Graphics" tab.
title: UBOAT

notes: As the other reviews note, game itself works perfectly. Does have decent load times, but I haven't played on Windows to test if that's a normal thing. Like a lot of Proton Games, ALT-TAB will result in black screen and you'll have to force kill the game. I use KDE and my desktop locked up. Switched to TTY2 to kill the game and restart XORG/KDE and it worked fine. I did not try the fix for it. In addition, the intro is still black. I waited about twenty seconds, pressed escape 3 times, and got to the main menu after a few more seconds of waiting. Minor issues. Overall, fun game and it's working great on Linux.
title: UBOAT

notes:
Like already described, hit Enter on black screen at the beginning.
The game is freshly in early access and still has some performance issues (even on Windows). I my case I needed to choose simple texture resolution in graphics settings to get reasonable (60) fps in full hd. One setting higher gives me around 20-30fps and some stuttering. Of course this could change with every update.

title: UBOAT

cpu: AMD A8-3870 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: Works fine out of the box. Out of three starts, the first time it hung itself up, when I Alt-Tabbed right after starting the game (before anything happened). I think I could have just waited or pressed escape but I did not know.  The second time I had to press ESC during the black screen on start up to get to the main menu. On the third try it worked fine without any help. It just took a long time (I had breakfast and watched a show while it was loading). The game itself works fine. Peformance even on medium (lowest preset available) is sluggish at times, though generally playable. Alt-Tabbing is not working. It won't hang the game or crash it. You can always return to it, but you can't get to your desktop or any other open window. I will give a Platinum rating, since the issues with performance and Alt-Tabbing are related to the game itself and there are the same issues on Windows. So it is nothing that is caused by Steam.
title: UBOAT

notes:
Had no issue running this game whatsoever. The game runs perfectly. However, it will show a black screen on startup. Press ESC a couple of times and you will get into the main menu. 

Game Performance on High is excellent at 75+ fps with my Vega64. Althought it is sluggish at times, but that is usually due to loading stuff.

Alt - Tabbing does not work, as the game will stay open and minimize into the corner.
title: UBOAT

notes: Hit enter or esc button if you get black screen at start that will help. Performance is a bit worse than in Windows. I also got black textures but I think it's because of bug in the Unity engine.
title: UBOAT
